visual_organic_quality.notes: Scene uses organic material helper recipes and a rounded socket marker; lysosome morphology is intentionally pending.

biology_accuracy.notes: Only rig/socket integration exists. Digestion, acidic interior, cargo, and recycling cues remain incomplete.

animation_functionality.notes: Lysosome_RootRig and WholeCell_ContextSocket establish parenting anchors for later movement and integration.

roblox_export_readiness.notes: Current scene uses simple empties and low-complexity socket geometry. Procedural node effects will need baking or simplification before Roblox export.

whole_cell_integration.notes: WholeCell_ContextSocket exists as the cell-level attach point.

notes: Phase 1 creates the Blender scene foundation only.
Shared organic material helper functions are defined inside build_lysosome.py.
Lighting, cameras, world color, units, render engine, and output folders are configured.
No Lysosome_Membrane, AcidicInterior_Volume, DigestiveEnzyme_Clusters, WasteCargo_Fragments, RecycledOutput_Cues, or Interaction_Hotspots geometry was built in this phase.
roblox_export_risks: Procedural material nodes are Blender-native and may require texture baking.
Later biological detail must stay within Roblox mesh and material budgets.
Future transparent acidic volume effects may need Roblox-specific approximation.
next_recommended_phase: Phase 2: build Lysosome_Membrane as an organic, asymmetrical, thickened magenta/pink vesicle shell with export-conscious topology.
